task: explicit formula operator with Ulam spiral mode decomposition

position.focus: Self-adjoint banded operator from primes — mode resolution via residue classes

session_summary: Session 7: gauge symmetry theorem (proven), transfer operators closed, RS/Z-Toeplitz red herrings identified, Berry-Keating xp -> Lanczos Jacobi -> explicit formula operator -> Ulam multi-mode decomposition. Inert primes dominate, split primes silent.
next_action: Derive coupling constants C_r from L-function values L(1,chi) or class numbers. Test mod 24 (8 modes). If C_r = f(Frobenius), this connects to Langlands.
